verses.text: “Bezalel leh Oholiab leh biakbuk lamna-ah nasep khat peuhpeuh sepna ding zia a thei dingin Topa in siamna leh pilna a guat mi peuhmah in Topa' thupiaksa khempeuh tawh kituakin sem ding uh hi,” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Mite in Letsong Tampi hong Paipih

verses.text: Moses in Bezalel leh Oholiab leh Topa in nasep siamna a guat mi, nasem-a pai dingin a ut mi peuhmah a sam hi
Israel mite in biakbuk sepna dingin utthu-a a piak uh nate a paipih khempeuh uh amaute in Moses' tung panin a sang uh hi. Amaute in zingsang simin utthu-a piakna ama tungah paipih uh ahih manin
biakbuk nasep a namkim a sem mi khempeuh amau' nasepna ciat panin hong pai uh a
Moses kiangah, “ Topa in eite' sep dingin a hong sawl nasepna dingin a kicing ding zahval, mite in tampi hong paipih uh hi,” a ci uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Moses in thu pia-in giahphual khempeuhah thu kizasak a, “Numei hita leh pasal hita leh kuamah in biakbuk-a dingin pia thuah nawn kei un,” kici hi. Tua ahih ciangin a piak ding uh mite kikho hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amau' piaksa nate pen nasepna khempeuh hihna dingin kicing a, valzaw lai hi.

Nasem mite' lak panin a hih thei mi khempeuh in puan dal sawm tawh biakbuk bawl uh hi. Tuate pen a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoih leh a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute tawh kibawlin hoihtakin a kibawl kherub-te tawh zem uh hi
Tua puan a dung pi sawmli leh nih, a vai pi guk ciat hi a, a puan khempeuh kikim hi
Amaute in puan dal ngate khatlekhat khuituahin, puan adang ngate zong khatlekhat mah khuituah uh hi
Amaute in a kikhuituah masa puan a nawlnung pen nawl dung sukah khau dum tawh a bilvangte bawl uh a, tua mah bangin a kikhuituah nihna puan a nawlnung pen nawl dung sukah zong tuate mah a bawl uh hi
Amaute in puan khat tungah bilvang sawmnga bawlin, a kikhuituah a nihna puan nawlah bilvang sawmnga mah bawl uh a, a bilvangte khatlekhat kitang hi
Amaute in kham kilhna sawmnga bawlin, tua kilhnate tawh a puan khatlekhat kimatsak uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin biakbuk puan bupkhat a suak hi
Amaute in biakbuk a tung khuhna dingin keelmul tawh puan dal sawmlekhat a bawl uh hi
Tua puante a dung pi sawmli leh nga, a vai pi guk ciat hi a, tua puan sawmlekhatte kikim hi
Amaute in puan dal ngate khatlekhat khuituahin, a puan dang gukte zong khatlekhat mah a khuituah uh hi
Amaute in a kikhuituah puan khat a nawlnung pen nawlah a bilvang sawmnga bawlin, puan dal a zom nawlah a bilvang sawmnga mah a bawl uh hi
Tuate bup khat a suah theihna ding, puanbuk a kimatsak dingin amaute in kilhna sawmnga sumngo tawh a bawl uh hi
Amaute in puanbuk-a dingin a kisansak tuutal vunte leh keel vunte tawh khuhna khat a bawl uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in biakbuk-a dingin singkha sing tawh a po to khawm ding khuampeekte a bawl uh hi
A khuampeekte khat a tun' pi sawm leh pi nga hi a, a vai pi nih leh letmat thum ciat ahi hi
A bulhna dingin khuampeek khat in zang nih ciat nei a, amaute in biakbuk khuam khempeuh-a dingin a bawl uh hi
Amaute in biakbuk-a dingin khuampeekte hih bangin bawl uh hi: Leitaw lampang-a dingin khuam sawmnih
a khuampeek sawmnihte' bulah bullen sawmli ngun tawh, a zang nihte-a' dingin khuampeek khat bulah bullen nih, leh a khuampeek dang khat bulah a zang nihte-a' dingin bullen nih mah a bawl uh hi
Biakbuk a pang nihna lam, leilu lampang-a dingin amaute in khuampeek sawmnih
leh ngun tawh kibawl a bullen sawmli, khuampeek khat bulah bullen nih, adang khuampeek khat bulah bullen nih mah a bawl uh hi
Nitumna lam, biakbuk nung lam-a dingin amaute in khuampeek guk a bawl uh hi
Biakbuk nung lam kiute-a dingin a khuampeek nih zong a bawl uh hi
Tuate a bul lamah kikak a, ahih hangin a kual masa-ah a dawn kimat hi. A kiu nihte-a dingin tua bangin nih a bawl uh hi
Ngun tawh kibawl amau' bullente tawh khuampeek giat om hi: Bullen sawmleguk om a, khuampeek khat bulah bullen nih ciat a om hi
Amaute in singkha singzawl, biakbuk pang khat-a khuampeekte-a' dingin nga
biakbuk a pang langkhat-a khuampeekte-a' dingin zawl nga, nitumna lam biakbuk nung lampanga khuampeekte-a' dingin zawl nga mah a bawl uh hi
A khuampeekte' kimciang takah mong khat panin mong khat dongin a zawl laita paisuak sak uh hi
Amaute in kham tawh khuampeekte zutin, zawlte a len dingin kham tawh a kualte bawl uh a, kham tawh a zawlte a zut uh hi
Amaute in a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute leh a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoih tawh dalna puan a bawl uh hi. Hoihtakin a kibawl kherub-te tawh amaute in tua dalna puan a zem uh hi
Tua puan-a' dingin amaute in singkha khuampi li bawl uh a, kham tawh tua khuampite a zut uh hi. A vankhainate pen kham hi a, tua khuamte-a' dingin ngun bullen li a sung uh hi
Amaute in puanbuk kongkhak-a dingin a dum, a dupsan, a ausan khaute leh phim tawh kikhui-in a kizem, a kopin a kikhuk a kigan puan hoih tawh kongpuankhai khat leh
a khuampi ngate a vankhainate tawh a bawl uh hi. Amaute in tuate' luzepnate kham tawh zutin, a gaknate kham hi a, ahih hangin a bullen ngate pen sumngo ahi hi.
